Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:` — patch bump)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:` — minor bump)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `fix!:` — major bump)
- [ ] Chore / refactor / docs (no API change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally (tsc + ESLint)
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes locally
- [ ] A `.changeset/*.md` entry has been added (skip for `chore:` with no user-visible change)
- [ ] Documentation in `docs/` updated if the public API or CLI changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any behaviour change
